artifacts.title: Time receipt from 2022-04-28
artifacts.excerpt: Just spent a lot of time observing my muscles, and instead of trying to visualize, like, melting ice or whatever, and try and get my muscles to relax, I let the image be what it wanted to be and do what it wanted to do. And they wanted to vibrate and dance.

artifacts.excerpt: we have very free will but all our decisions take place outside of time

artifacts.title: Time receipt from 2022-11-03
artifacts.excerpt: @TheHummingVoid Running my life into the ground and observing the debris. I mean that makes it sound a little more dramatic than it's been but... I first noticed because it wasn't working anymore. It's just taken me a long time to clarify the image.

planets.name: Really

artifacts.title: Really receipt from 2019-05-15
artifacts.excerpt: @MichaelSkolnik @Lavernecox Laverne you're really gonna erase our trans brothers' struggle in this fight by retweeting this? I admire you too much not to call that out. Trans people of all genders are oppressed by the realities and language of this fight, we need to stick together in solidarity.
artifacts.proof_of_search: Community Archive row → normalized post → topic planet. Terms: really, good, feel, want.

artifacts.title: Really receipt from 2022-08-13
artifacts.excerpt: @hankgreen Division doesn't really exist, what looks like 8/10 is 8 x 1/10th, and 10/8 is really 10 x 1/8th, and those clearly aren't the same. Same with subtraction: it's really just addition, we write it as subtraction for simplification purposes.
artifacts.proof_of_search: Community Archive row → normalized post → topic planet. Terms: really, good, feel, want.

artifacts.title: Really receipt from 2019-01-11
artifacts.excerpt: @NebraskaMegan "Menstrual hygiene products" is such important wording for all of our NB/trans and intersex siblings who aren't women but still use them. It's a small thing but I really appreciate it.
artifacts.proof_of_search: Community Archive row → normalized post → topic planet. Terms: really, good, feel, want.

artifacts.title: Really receipt from 2023-08-15
artifacts.excerpt: @goblinodds god this whole thing has already felt like an allegory for my experience reflecting on red-tribe/blue-tribe but this tweet really hits the spot lol; the frogs-in-a-pot realization that the more invested I become in convincing others they're wrong, the less trustworthy I become
artifacts.proof_of_search: Community Archive row → normalized post → topic planet. Terms: really, good, feel, want.

You'd think that people with materialist worldviews would be the first to tell you that the brain is part of the body and that there is no mind but body-mind 🤔

This isn't just a dunk I'm genuinely curious how so many smart people fail to notice this inconsistency.
